item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 3min Álvaro Arbeloa, on team bus leaving Munich… on his possible last moment as Real

FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 4min Arbeloa: “Camavinga? No one understands it. It’s UNFAIR”.
“The game ended there
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 4min Arbeloa: “Camavinga? No one understands it. It’s UNFAIR”.
“The game ended there. I think the referee did NOT remembee he had a yellow card”. 119 72 673 19 mil

item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 5min Éder Militão: “The red card was unfair”. 176 80 841 25 mil
item.description: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 5min Éder Militão: “The red card was unfair”. 176 80 841 25 mil

item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 6min Arda Güler: “This isn’t how it should’ve been. We are sorry. We will be back. Ha
item.description: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 6min Arda Güler: “This isn’t how it should’ve been. We are sorry. We will be back. Hala Madrid”. 141 98 99 1 mil 26 mil
